UPLINK SUBSCRIPTION FORM

May 1991
Journalism & Newsroom

This is a membership or registration form for The Missouri Institute for Computer-Assisted Reporting requesting personal information and a $15 payment sent to the University of Missouri School of Journalism.

Name:

Title:

Organization:

Address:

Please send this form and $15 dollars to The Missouri Institute for Computer-Assisted Reporting, University of Missouri School of Journalism, 120 Neff Hall, Columbia, MO, 65211. Make Checks Payable to The University of Missouri. Thank you.
